text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 33 

LCNS_NUM 

LABEL: Provider License or Accreditation Number 

DESCRIPTION: A data element to capture the license or accreditation number issued to the provider by the licensing 
entity or accreditation body identified in the LCNS_ISSG_ENT_ID data element. 

SHORT NAME: LCNS_NUM 

LONG NAME: LCNS_NUM 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 20 

FILE(S): APR License 

SOURCE: T-MSIS
